D,k in ipairs({{553903+-553902,204709-204208};{-658514-(-658515);-305410+305881},{176253-175781,333509+-333008}})do while k[-403032+403033]<k[190826+-190824]do end local function D(D)return b[D-(546789-525280)]end do local D=math.floor local t(r,W(D((E%(-840434-(-905970)))/(591765+-591509))))end break end P=P+(623896+-623895)end T[b]=j(r)end end end return(function(b,T,j,n,F,t,g,O,l,G,w,r,p,d,E,C,V,J,A,P,S,k,W)W,A,C,S,w,k,p,r,P,l,E,O,d,G,V,J={},function(b,D)local T=E(D)local j=function(j,n,F,t,g,W)return k(b,{j,n;F,t;g,W},D,T)end return j end,{},function(b)C[b]=C[b]-(526273+-526272)if C[b]==-428645+428645 then C[b],W[b]=nil,nil end end,function(b,D)local T=E(D)local j=function(j,n)return k(b,{j;n},D,T)end return j end,function(k,j,n,F)local E,Z,dE,B,L,WE,H,nE,m,OE,e,tE,kE,N,o,v,SE,rE,lE,JE,CE,C,jE,U,q,Y,M,TE,gE,x,K,a,FE,y,Q,h,z,g,G,R,O,DE,P,PE,u,c,bE,EE,s,GE,I,i,f,X while k do if k<9754672-862065 then if
